title: Pixel Perfection x THE TWILIGHT FOREST
description: The Twilight Forest, but for Pixel Perfection.
body:
**_(NOTE: THIS IS A PROJECT IN BETA PHASE)_** This is a **compatibility** pack between [The Twilight Forest Unofficial](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-twilight-forest-unofficial) and [Pixel Perfection Fidelity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-fidelity) or [Pixel Perfection Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy). This pack only supports 1.20.1, 1.6.x, 1.7.x and 1.8.x. Try my new Texture pack **Pixel Perfection Fidelity**

This resource pack adds textures compatible with Pixel Perfection Legacy texture pack and it is meant to be used alongside it. It changes the textures of The Twilight Forest to make them look medieval and less saturated, adapting it to work perfectly with Pixel Perfection. So far the features present in the pack are: - GUI integration - Most of the naturally generated building blocks - Most items Future features to be implemented: - Retexturing entities - Armor 3D layout - Particles - Paintings - Compatibility with newer versions For any bugs or feedback, reach out on my discord. # **MY OTHER PACKS** - [Pixel Perfection Fidelity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-fidelity) - [Pixel Perfection x FARMER'S DELIGHT](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixelperfectionxfarmersdelight) - [Pixel Perfection x AD ASTRA](https://modrinth.com/project/pixel-perfection-x-ad-astra) - [Pixel Perfection x DEHYDRATION](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-x-dehydration) - [Pixel Perfection x CONTROLIFY](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-x-controlify) - [PPL Alternative GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-alternative-gui) - [PPL Compat Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-compatibility-pack) - [PPL Hodgepodge](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-hodgepodge) - [PPL Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-better-grass) - [PPL Custom Theme for Jade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-custom-theme-for-jade)
